skills.name: react-best-practices
skills.description: React and Next.js performance optimization guidelines from Vercel Engineering. Use when writing new React components, implementing data fetching, or optimizing bundle size and load times.

skills.name: web-design-guidelines
skills.description: Review UI code for Vercel Web Interface Guidelines compliance. Use when asked to review UI, check accessibility, audit design, or check site against best practices.

skills.name: react-native-guidelines
skills.description: React Native best practices optimized for AI agents. Use when building React Native or Expo apps, optimizing mobile performance, or implementing animations and gestures.

skills.name: composition-patterns
skills.description: React composition patterns that scale. Use when refactoring components with many boolean props, building reusable component libraries, or designing flexible APIs.

skills.name: vercel-deploy-claimable
skills.description: Deploy applications and websites to Vercel instantly. Use when asked to deploy app, push to production, or deploy and get a link.

installation.claude-ai: Add the skill to project knowledge or paste SKILL.md contents into the conversation.

usage.automatic: Skills are automatically available once installed. The agent will use them when relevant tasks are detected.
usage.manual: Reference skills by name in your prompts or let the agent detect when to use them based on context.
